nodes.name: Tumbes tyrant
nodes.summary: Tumbes tyrant（Tumbes tyrant，学名 Ochthoeca salvini），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 通贝斯大区
nodes.summary: 通贝斯大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括淡眉穴䳍、Peruvian plantcutter、Northern schiffornis等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 秘鲁
nodes.summary: 秘鲁是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联962种鸟类，包括北山䳍、高山斑䳍、丽色斑䳍等962种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 洛哈省
nodes.summary: 洛哈省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括淡眉穴䳍、茶腹隐蜂鸟、秘鲁蜂鸟等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 拉利伯塔德大区
nodes.summary: 拉利伯塔德大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Tawny-throated dotterel、闪羽蜂鸟、Maranon tyrannulet等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It found in Ecuador and Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It found in Ecuador and Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Tumbes tyrant is primarily found in northwestern Peru from Tumbes Department south to La Libertad Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Tumbes tyrant is primarily found in northwestern Peru from Tumbes Department south to La Libertad Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in extreme southwestern Ecuador, where it was first discovered in Loja Province in late 2008.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: (2009) "Discovery of Tumbes Tyrant Tumbezia salvini in Ecuador" Cotinga 31: 137. It inhabits arid woodlands and scrublands where it favors groves of Acacia and Prosopis mesquite and is often found near dry watercourses

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Habitat destruction is the principal threat, with selective logging, understorey clearance, loss of riverine thickets to irrigated agriculture, large-scale agriculture in the coastal plains and over-grazing by goats the main processes." It is considered "locally fairly common" in Peru. It occurs in at least one protected area in that country

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Habitat destruction is the principal threat, with selective logging, understorey clearance, loss of riverine thickets to irrigated agriculture, large-scale agriculture in the coastal plains and over-grazing by goats the main processes." It is considered "locally fairly common" in Peru. It occurs in at least one protected area in that country
